remarks: Located in Stamford's sought-after Westover neighborhood, 53 West Hill Circle has been fully reimagined into a sophisticated, move-in-ready 4 bedroom, 3.5 bath residence defined by scale, light, and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The centerpiece is a striking chef's kitchen with a large statement island, custom cabinetry, and premium Wolf and Sub-Zero appliances. Generous storage, including multiple pantry spaces, enhances both function and everyday living, while the kitchen opens effortlessly into the main living areas. A sun-filled dining/sunroom serves as a standout feature, with vaulted ceilings, a dramatic picture window overlooking the pool and bluestone patio, and direct outdoor access-creating a natural extension of the living space. A wet bar with wine cooler enhances the home's entertaining appeal. The expansive family room is anchored by a distinctive, designer-inspired fireplace, offering both warmth and architectural presence. The primary suite features two walk-in closets and a fully renovated bath, while all bathrooms have been thoughtfully updated with clean, modern finishes.
